name: Banana Walnut Snack Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Pour Snack Cake mix into an ungreased 8 or 9-inch square baking pan.
3. In a small bowl, combine remaining ingredients and beat with a fork until blended.
4. Stir the mixture into the Snack Cake mix until fully combined.
5. Bake for 30-35 minutes in the preheated oven.
6. Insert a wooden pick into the center of the cake. When it comes out clean, remove from the oven.
7. Cool on a rack.
8. Serve to 9 people.
